_comment: Live Champions data corrections. Edit this file on GitHub (web UI or a commit) and every app — desktop, web, Android — picks it up on next launch. No rebuild needed. moveOverrides: patch a move's accuracy/power/type/category/pp/priority/desc by name. learnsetAdditions: give a species extra learnable moves.

Make It Rain.desc: Lowers the user's Sp. Atk by 2. Hits foe(s).
